checklist.officialDateSource: ennaharonline.com citing Algeria Post/CNR official announcement; mtess.gov.dz
checklist.weekendException: Friday and Saturday → advance to preceding Thursday

notes: IMPORTANT: This event uses day=18 as anchor (first payments begin), but payments extend to day 26 depending on CCP suffix. The countdown shows days until payment WINDOW STARTS.
CNR is the correct institution, NOT CNAS (which handles health/accident insurance for salaried workers). The backlog had an error calling it 'CNAS'.
The CCP-based multi-day schedule was introduced in July 2020 by Algeria Post + CNR to prevent post office overcrowding.
June 2026 had exceptional advancement to June 7-15; normal schedule resumes from July 2026.
Algeria weekend: Friday+Saturday since 2009 labor law reform.
Algeria uses Gregorian calendar officially (no Hijri dates needed).
